title: Conference Agenda Planner
scenario: Plan a simple conference agenda for a single day. The agenda should include 6 sessions. Each session should include the session title, speaker name, and start/end time. The agenda should be formatted as a table with clear column headers.
constraints: Must be under 200 characters per row

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the agenda meets the constraints of having 6 sessions and being under 200 characters per row.
Check if the agenda is formatted as a table with clear column headers.
Check if each session includes the correct information (title, speaker name, start/end time).
